pull.title: Correctly abort the failed grammar requests & Improve the handling of abort
pull.body:
- Abort the requests in the grammar queue correctly
- Return errors immediately for invalid grammar requests instead of silently ignoring the grammar
- Simplify the redundant code for aborted requests

repo.name: sglang
repo.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

repo.name: sglang
repo.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
